subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou art He Who hath planted the Tree of Thy loving-kindness in the Paradise of Thy oneness and watered it from the spring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت الذی غرست شجره رحمانیتک فی فردوس فردانیتک و سقیتها من معین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
